summary: Beat Mates iteration 3 testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login page renders correctly with email and password fields, after login home feed shows with stories bar and posts. All requested API endpoints tested and working.

issues: Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (use expo-video), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation, useNativeDriver not supported - all cosmetic warnings

critical_code_review_comments: All 24 API endpoints tested and working correctly
Login flow works with test credentials mario@test.com / password123
Stories bar displays correctly with user avatars
Posts feed displays photo and video posts with correct metadata
Tab bar has 6 icons as expected: home, create, available, reels, music, profile
Video posts show video indicator icon correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed data (users, posts, comments) for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login requires waiting for Expo app to initialize (~5 seconds). Use JavaScript evaluation to click the 'Log in' button due to React Native Web button structure. Tab bar has 6 icons. Posts display correctly with video indicator for video posts. Video playback cannot be tested in Playwright due to H.264 codec limitation.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/auth/register: PASSED - Creates new user and returns token
backend_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Authenticates with email/password, returns token
backend_endpoints.GET /api/users/me: PASSED - Returns current user profile with all fields
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/users/me: PASSED - Updates user profile, persists changes
backend_endpoints.GET /api/posts: PASSED - Returns all posts with user info
backend_endpoints.POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like: PASSED - Toggles like status on post
backend_endpoints.GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments: PASSED - Returns all comments for post
backend_endpoints.GET /api/users/{user_id}/posts: PASSED - Returns posts by specific user
backend_endpoints.GET /api/stories: PASSED - Returns stories grouped by user
backend_endpoints.GET /api/live-sessions/pending: PASSED - Returns pending sessions for teacher
backend_endpoints.GET /api/live-sessions/pending/count: PASSED - Returns count of pending sessions
backend_endpoints.POST /api/upload: PASSED - Uploads image/video files, returns URL
backend_endpoints.GET /api/: PASSED - API root returns version info
backend_endpoints.GET /api/health: PASSED - Health check returns healthy status

frontend_screens.login_page: PASSED - Renders with BEAT MATES branding, email/password inputs, Log in button, Facebook login, Sign up link
frontend_screens.home_feed: PASSED - Shows stories bar (Your Story + other users), posts feed with user info, action icons (like, comment, share, bookmark), video indicator for video posts, tab bar with 6 icons
